reason: Missing dependencies. This node applies the main theorem (Node 1.3/1.4) to the quantum marginal problem but declares no dependencies. It should depend on at minimum: (1) Node 1.3 (Main Dimension Bound) or Node 1 (the parent theorem), since the entire claim is an application of that theorem; (2) Node 1.4 (Commutant Decomposition and Multiplicity Bound), since the conclusion Sigma n_i^2 <= m+1 uses the Artin-Wedderburn decomposition of the commutant from that node. Without these dependencies, the logical connection to the rest of the proof tree is absent.
